task_summary: Extract a structured intent from a natural language request specifically for Odokai plans, outputting a JSON object with predefined keys and strict constraints.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: A user request formatted as an Odokai intent parsing prompt.
inputs.example:
Analyze this request and extract the structured intent.

Request: Every weekday at 9am email me a summary of new support tickets.

outputs.name: intent_json
outputs.description: A single JSON object with exact keys for intentType, scheduleCron, requiredCapabilities, clarifyingQuestions, domainContext, and description.
outputs.example: {"intentType":"recurring","scheduleCron":"0 9 * * 1-5","requiredCapabilities":["email","summarization"],"clarifyingQuestions":[],"domainContext":"reporting","description":"Every weekday at 9am email me a summary of new support tickets."}

success_criteria: Outputs valid JSON only, with no extra commentary or markdown.
Uses exactly the required keys and no extra keys.
Classifies intentType correctly as one-time or recurring.
Uses a valid 5-field cron when a concrete schedule is present, or null when not.
Chooses only allowed capability identifiers relevant to the request.
Uses short, sensible clarifying questions only when required information is missing.
Produces an accurate domainContext and preserves the request meaning in description.
failure_modes: Outputs any text outside the JSON object.
Uses missing, extra, or wrong keys in the JSON object.
Returns an invalid intentType or malformed scheduleCron.
Uses capability names outside the allowed list.
Adds clarifying questions when the request is already specific enough.
Misses obvious recurrence cues like daily, weekly, monthly, or explicit schedule times.
Over-normalizes or distorts the user's original request in description.
difficulty_axes: schedule_specificity: explicit cron-like timing versus vague recurring language
capability_inference: single obvious tool versus multiple implied capabilities
ambiguity_level: fully specified requests versus requests needing clarification
